title: Whom the Gods Destroy
writer: Albert Payson Terhune, Sidney Buchman, Fred Niblo Jr.
actors: Walter Connolly, Robert Young, Doris Kenyon
plot: Broadway's most successful producer, John Forrester, is deeply in love with his wife Margaret and dreams of the future when his son Jack will step into his shoes. He sails to England to produce a show but the ship strikes a dereli...
